rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to add comparison baseline, test method, and measurable difference to comparative claims.
summary: Add named comparison baseline, test conditions, and measurable difference to comparative or superiority claims.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Versus, compared to, number one, or goes beyond language without baseline. ACTION: State benchmark product, test method, and measurable difference. CHECK: Charts, side-by-side imagery, and headline claims. ESCALATE IF: Competitor identifiable but test conditions absent.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Comparative chart lacks axis labels or implied superiority without data source.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_remove_terms on ad text; must_include_concepts on rewrite guidance text.
